rows.label: qev085407_MSG1001
rows.name:
Aisha is different from us B.B.s;
she's a cat with a flesh-and-blood body.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085407_MSG1002
rows.name:
If she dies, she cannot be revived.
Before she gets attacked by the monsters around here,
I must quickly bring her back to NLA—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085407_MSG1003
rows.name:
It seems Kiran Catnip grows naturally
in the northwest of Gensho no Kōya or the Biahno Grassland.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085407_MSG1004
rows.name:
Please, hurry and go fetch some.
I'm sorry, but I'm counting on you—[ST:wait ]
